title: Sub-workflow not returning data due to merge node issue
symptom: The sub-workflow executes successfully but does not return data for certain routes, leading to empty outputs in the main workflow.
applies_when: Involves merge nodes and conditional checks
not_this_if: All routes in the sub-workflow return data correctly
root_cause: The issue arises when a merge node is waiting for inputs that are not provided due to conditional logic in the workflow. If one path of the workflow is activated, the merge node may not receive all necessary inputs, causing it to not complete properly.
fix_steps: Rearrange the workflow to merge data before applying conditional checks
Ensure that all paths provide necessary inputs to the merge node
Test the sub-workflow to confirm it returns data correctly
agent_instruction: Rearrange the merge and if nodes in the workflow to ensure proper data flow.
